personalInfo.name: Faizan Ahmed
personalInfo.description: Full Stack Developer with 4+ years of experience in JavaScript (React, Next.js, Node.js), Python, and cloud services (AWS, Azure). Specialized in microservices, real-time data pipelines, and infrastructure automation with Terraform. Strong communicator and team player with proven success delivering scalable, secure, and high-performance systems.

projects.name: Forwood Safety
projects.description: Designed and delivered a microservices architecture using Python and React, supporting scalable web applications.
achievements: Designed and delivered a microservices architecture using Python and React, supporting scalable web applications
Automated infrastructure with Terraform to deploy AWS Lambda, API Gateway, and CloudWatch, streamlining operations
Configured Route53 and CloudFront for optimized DNS and content delivery, enhancing global performance
Managed data with AWS RDS and DynamoDB for high availability and scalability
Developed caching with S3 to minimize latency and speed up data access
Implemented Kinesis streams for real-time microservices data processing, increasing system responsiveness
Established a shared Lambda repository to centralize reusable code, boosting maintainability
Orchestrated batch workflows with SQS using custom dispatcher and consumer Lambdas
Led a micro-frontend strategy with React, enabling independent deployment and scaling of UI modules
Engineered Jest test suites for React components and Python unit tests, ensuring robust microservices reliability

projects.name: LexPair
projects.description: Built a legal matching platform that collects client case details and attorney practice, territory, and tier data, auto-assigning leads based on profile and subscription.
achievements: Built a legal matching platform that collects client case details and attorney practice, territory, and tier data, auto-assigning leads based on profile and subscription
Implemented multi-role authentication for Client, Attorney, and Admin users with OTP verification, Google and Microsoft OAuth, role-based routing, and protected dashboards
Managed full lead lifecycle from Draft to Submitted to Claimed to Contacted to Retained or Closed with tier-based visibility for Gold, Silver, and Bronze plans
Developed attorney onboarding, lead management, and admin CMS modules for blogs, FAQs, case studies, and testimonials

projects.name: Emotion-Aware Multilingual Voice Processing System
projects.description: Designed and developed an end-to-end voice processing system that records audio, detects emotional tone, converts speech to text, translates content, and generates emotionally adaptive text-to-speech output.
achievements: Designed and developed an end-to-end voice processing system that records audio, detects emotional tone, converts speech to text, translates content between English and Spanish, and generates emotionally adaptive text-to-speech output
Built a multi-stage pipeline integrating Deepgram API for speech-to-text transcription and automatic language detection
Utilized OpenSmile to detect emotional characteristics from audio input
Implemented DeepL API for accurate bidirectional translation between English and Spanish
Integrated ElevenLabs API to generate emotion-preserving text-to-speech output with mapped voice parameters
Developed RESTful APIs to orchestrate service communication with structured error handling and fault tolerance

projects.name: Authenpush
projects.description: Built a secure identity verification platform using Next.js and Supabase, enabling seamless integration with Microsoft Authenticator for improved user authentication.
achievements: Built a secure identity verification platform using Next.js and Supabase, enabling seamless integration with Microsoft Authenticator for improved user authentication
Designed and implemented RESTful APIs to support communication between frontend applications, Azure cloud services, and identity workflows
Managed real-time database operations and authentication via Supabase, maintaining data integrity and compliance
Deployed scalable infrastructure on Azure and developed responsive UI components for consistent cross-device experiences

projects.name: Oxit
projects.description: Developed backend APIs for an IoT solution using Node.js, enhancing connectivity between devices and the cloud.
achievements: Developed backend APIs for an IoT solution using Node.js, enhancing connectivity between devices and the cloud
Integrated IoT protocols including MQTT and WebSockets to boost reliability and real-time interactions
Collaborated with frontend and DevOps teams to ensure backend scalability and security
Delivered a robust IoT platform that supported project success

projects.name: Med Opinion
projects.description: Developed a complete medical consultation backend using NestJS with robust authentication.
achievements: Developed a complete medical consultation backend using NestJS with robust authentication
Integrated APIs to connect the React.js frontend for seamless user interactions
Deployed the platform on Heroku

projects.name: Galae Health
projects.description: Built profile pages and implemented filtering for service providers by location, price, and specialization.
achievements: Built profile pages and implemented filtering for service providers by location, price, and specialization
Connected the React.js frontend with APIs to deliver real-time health data updates

projects.name: IFancy
projects.description: Developed backend APIs for an e-commerce platform focused on watches using Express.js.
achievements: Developed backend APIs for an e-commerce platform focused on watches using Express.js
Coordinated with frontend teams for smooth integration

projects.name: Trade4U
projects.description: Designed intuitive frontend pages for a crypto trading platform.
achievements: Designed intuitive frontend pages for a crypto trading platform
Integrated APIs for live data and user interaction

awards.title: Volunteering Social Enthusiast Award
awards.description: Recognized for leadership in organizing and managing social activities, including overseeing events such as monthly dinners, sports activities, and daily operational tasks as the head of the social committee.

education.details: Dedicated 150 hours to developing key professional skills in communication, leadership, problem-solving, and teamwork.
